rules.rule_text:
rule banbra : banker
{
	meta:
		author = "@abhinavbom"
		maltype = "NA"
		version = "0.1"
		date = "8/06/2015"

	strings:
		$a = "senha" fullword nocase
		$b = "cartao" fullword nocase
		$c = "caixa"
		$d = "login" fullword nocase
		$e = ".com.br"

	condition:
		#a> 3 and #b > 3 and #c > 3 and #d > 3 and #e > 3
}
